seo.descriptionDefault: The official Python community in Indore, India. Join early, help shape the culture, and grow alongside fellow developers.

footer.blurb: The official Python community in Indore, India. Empowering developers through knowledge sharing, collaboration, and innovation.
footer.newsletterCopy: Stay updated with our latest events and announcements.

sections.heading: Build with Python. In Indore.
sections.subheading: A new Python community forming in Indore. Join us from the very beginning, help shape the culture, and grow alongside fellow developers.

sections.heading: Empowering Python developers in Central India
sections.subheading: We are a community of Python enthusiasts in Indore dedicated to promoting Python through collaboration, education, and innovation.
sections.body: PyIndore aims to build a strong ecosystem for Python developers in Central India. We believe in the power of community-driven learning.

tiles.title: Innovation First
tiles.description: We push boundaries and embrace modern Python practices.

tiles.title: Community Driven
tiles.description: Every decision is made with our members at heart.

features.title: Knowledge Sharing
features.description: Regular meetups, workshops, and seminars to share Python expertise and best practices.

features.title: Vibrant Community
features.description: A diverse group of developers — from beginners to experts — helping each other grow.

features.title: Open Source
features.description: Encouraging contributions to Python projects and fostering an open-source culture.

features.title: Learning Hub
features.description: Resources and mentorship for students and professionals to master Python.

sections.heading: Learn, connect, and grow together
sections.subheading: Join our regular meetups, workshops, and seminars to sharpen your Python skills and connect with fellow developers.

speakerCta.body: Share your Python knowledge with our community. All experience levels are welcome.
speakerCta.label: Become a Speaker
speakerCta.heading: Want to speak at PyIndore?

sections.heading: Be part of something bigger
sections.subheading: Connect with Indore's most active Python community. Learn, collaborate, and grow alongside passionate developers.

joinCta.body: Start your journey with Indore's most active Python community. Connect with developers, learn new skills, and advance your career.
joinCta.label: Join Now — It's Free
joinCta.heading: Ready to join PyIndore?

sections.heading: Get in touch
sections.subheading: Have questions about PyIndore? Want to collaborate or speak at our events? We'd love to hear from you.

events.title: Async Python Deep Dive
events.description: Understanding asyncio, event loops, and concurrency in Python.
events.speaker: Rohan Mehta

events.title: PyIndore Launch Meetup
events.description: Our very first community meetup — lightning talks and networking.

communityFeatures.title: Active Discussions
communityFeatures.description: Daily discussions, Q&A, and knowledge sharing in our online community.

communityFeatures.title: Mentorship
communityFeatures.description: Connect with experienced developers who guide you on your Python journey.

communityFeatures.title: Project Collaboration
communityFeatures.description: Find teammates for your projects or contribute to community initiatives.

communityFeatures.title: Learning Resources

communityFeatures.title: Career Opportunities
communityFeatures.description: Job openings, internships, and freelance work in the Python ecosystem.

communityFeatures.title: Recognition
communityFeatures.description: Celebrate achievements and get recognised for your contributions.

testimonials.name: Aakash Verma
testimonials.content: PyIndore's workshops and community helped me grow into a confident Python developer.

testimonials.name: Sneha Agarwal
testimonials.content: The mentorship at PyIndore connected me with professionals who guided my data science journey.

faq.question: How do I join PyIndore?
faq.answer: Join our Telegram group or follow us on social media to get started. Everyone from beginners to experts is welcome.

faq.question: Are events free?
faq.answer: Most of our events are free. Premium workshops may charge a small fee to cover venue and material costs.

faq.question: Can I speak at an event?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We welcome speakers of all experience levels — contact us with your topic idea and we'll help you prepare.
